[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 100110100 4
1 101111011 7
2 101010111 6
3 001000110 3
4 011111100 6
5 000000000 a
6 100101110 5
7 000101001 3
